examples: Cecilia Tallis: No I told you I wouldn't.
Disappointing though this is, Tallis might have a point.
Cecilia Tallis: Robbie, look at me, come back, come back to me.
Ms. VANESSA REDGRAVE (Actress): (As Briony Tallis) I'd rather you didn't.
Ms. REDGRAVE: (As Briony Tallis) I probably won't ever finish it.
